title: aster crenifolius
intro: Aster crenifolius, also known as the white prairie aster or starved-cats aster, is a perennial plant native to North America. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Aster crenifolius include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive discomfort, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
